senses.gloss: a pad, bolster, a padding or bundle surrounding and holding a thing preliminarily
a dry measure containing 97 ½ kg wheat

etymology.text: Borrowed from Aramaic, attested in Classical Syriac ܟܪܬܐ (kārtā, “pack, bundle; burden, load one can bear”). Doublet of كَرّ (karr, “six ass loads”) and كُوَارَة (kuwāra, “beehive”).
